toolSpec.name: audit_services
toolSpec.description: PRIMARY SERVICE AUDIT TOOL - The #1 tool for comprehensive AWS service health auditing and monitoring.

service_targets.description: REQUIRED. JSON array of service targets. Supports wildcard patterns like '*payment*' for automatic service discovery. Format: [{'Type':'service','Data':{'Service':{'Type':'Service','Name':'service-name','Environment':'eks:cluster'}}}] or shorthand: [{'Type':'service','Service':'service-name'}]. Large target lists are automatically processed in batches.

start_time.description: Start time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now-24h UTC.

end_time.description: End time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now UTC.

auditors.description: Optional. Comma-separated auditors (e.g., 'slo,operation_metric,dependency_metric'). Defaults to 'slo,operation_metric' for fast service health auditing. Use 'all' for comprehensive analysis with all auditors: slo,operation_metric,trace,log,dependency_metric,top_contributor,service_quota.

toolSpec.name: audit_slos
toolSpec.description: PRIMARY SLO AUDIT TOOL - The #1 tool for comprehensive SLO compliance monitoring and breach analysis.

slo_targets.description: REQUIRED. JSON array of SLO targets. Supports wildcard patterns like '*payment*' for automatic SLO discovery. Format: [{'Type':'slo','Data':{'Slo':{'SloName':'slo-name'}}}] or [{'Type':'slo','Data':{'Slo':{'SloArn':'arn:aws:...'}}}]. Large target lists are automatically processed in batches.

start_time.description: Start time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now-24h UTC.

end_time.description: End time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now UTC.

auditors.description: Optional. Comma-separated auditors (e.g., 'slo,trace,log'). Defaults to 'slo' for fast SLO compliance auditing. Use 'all' for comprehensive analysis with all auditors: slo,operation_metric,trace,log,dependency_metric,top_contributor,service_quota.

toolSpec.name: audit_service_operations
toolSpec.description: 🥇 PRIMARY OPERATION AUDIT TOOL - The #1 RECOMMENDED tool for operation-specific analysis and performance investigation.

operation_targets.description: REQUIRED. JSON array of service operation targets. Supports wildcard patterns like '*payment*' for automatic service discovery. Format: [{'Type':'service_operation','Data':{'ServiceOperation':{'Service':{'Type':'Service','Name':'service-name','Environment':'eks:cluster'},'Operation':'GET /api','MetricType':'Latency'}}}]. Large target lists are automatically processed in batches.

start_time.description: Start time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now-24h UTC.

end_time.description: End time (unix seconds or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'). Defaults to now UTC.

auditors.description: Optional. Comma-separated auditors (e.g., 'operation_metric,trace,log'). Defaults to 'operation_metric' for fast operation-level auditing. Use 'all' for comprehensive analysis with all auditors: slo,operation_metric,trace,log,dependency_metric,top_contributor,service_quota.

toolSpec.name: analyze_canary_failures
toolSpec.description: Comprehensive canary failure analysis with deep dive into issues.

toolSpec.name: list_monitored_services
toolSpec.description: OPTIONAL TOOL for service discovery - audit_services() can automatically discover services using wildcard patterns.

toolSpec.name: get_service_detail
toolSpec.description: Get detailed information about a specific Application Signals service.

service_name.description: Name of the service to get details for (case-sensitive)

toolSpec.name: query_service_metrics
toolSpec.description: Get CloudWatch metrics for a specific Application Signals service.

service_name.description: Name of the service to get metrics for (case-sensitive)

metric_name.description: Specific metric name (e.g., Latency, Error, Fault). Leave empty to list available metrics

statistic.description: Standard statistic type (Average, Sum, Maximum, Minimum, SampleCount)

extended_statistic.description: Extended statistic (p99, p95, p90, p50, etc)

hours.description: Number of hours to look back (default 1, max 168 for 1 week)

toolSpec.name: list_service_operations
toolSpec.description: OPERATION DISCOVERY TOOL - For operation inventory only. Use audit_services() as PRIMARY tool for operation auditing.

service_name.description: Name of the service to list operations for (case-sensitive)

hours.description: Number of hours to look back for operation discovery (default 24, max 24 for Application Signals operation discovery)

toolSpec.name: get_slo
toolSpec.description: Get detailed information about a specific Service Level Objective (SLO).

slo_id.description: The ARN or name of the SLO to retrieve

toolSpec.name: list_slos
toolSpec.description: List all Service Level Objectives (SLOs) in Application Signals.

key_attributes.description: JSON string of key attributes to filter SLOs (e.g., '{"Name": "my-service", "Environment": "ecs:my-cluster"}'. Defaults to empty object to list all SLOs.

include_linked_accounts.description: Whether to include SLOs from linked accounts (default: True)

max_results.description: Maximum number of SLOs to return (default: 50, max: 50)

toolSpec.name: search_transaction_spans
toolSpec.description: Executes a CloudWatch Logs Insights query for transaction search (100% sampled trace data).

log_group_name.description: CloudWatch log group name (defaults to "aws/spans" if not provided)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

max_timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for query completion

toolSpec.name: query_sampled_traces
toolSpec.description: SECONDARY TRACE TOOL - Query AWS X-Ray traces (5% sampled data) for trace investigation.

start_time.description: Start time in ISO format (e.g., "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"). Defaults to 3 hours ago

end_time.description: End time in ISO format (e.g., "2024-01-01T01:00:00Z"). Defaults to current time

filter_expression.description: X-Ray filter expression to narrow results (e.g., service("service-name"){fault = true})

region.description: AWS region (defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable)

toolSpec.name: list_slis
toolSpec.description: SPECIALIZED TOOL - Use audit_service_health() as the PRIMARY tool for service auditing.

hours.description: Number of hours to look back (default 24, typically use 24 for daily checks)
